# FinCore (FinCorKaz LLP)

> Factoring finance company based in Almaty, Kazakhstan

## About

FinCore.kz is a fintech company specializing in factoring finance. We help businesses access working capital quickly and without complex banking procedures, offering a personalized approach and modern technology.

## Services

- **Express Factoring**: Amounts up to 15M KZT, terms up to 180 days, decision from 1 business day, minimal documents, standard terms.
- **Maximum Factoring**: Amounts from 15M KZT and above, flexible terms by agreement, individual conditions, personal manager, extended analytics.

## Industries We Serve

- Taxi and car fleets
- Delivery services
- E-commerce and marketplaces
- Auto dealers
- Auto parts suppliers
- Logistics and car sharing

## How It Works

1. Submit an application via email or WhatsApp
2. We analyze your business and select optimal terms
3. Sign documents (minimal paperwork)
4. Receive financing to your account

## Advantages

- Fast decisions (from 1 business day)
- Flexible terms (individual approach)
- Transparency (no hidden fees)
- Minimal documents
